body.title: Fix ring_memory docstring: no instance_id column; scoping is via local-DB proxy
body.result: Shipped in 78803953. Replaced false 'indexed by instance_id column' claim with truth: per-instance isolation comes from make_local_proxy (each box owns its own DB). Column list corrected to match CREATE TABLE: id, category, content, timestamp, thread_id.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 1 Gap G1 (SHIP). cortex.py docstring (lines 39-42) claims ring_memory is `Indexed by instance_id so each Igor box gets its own ring. Columns: id, content, timestamp, instance_id, thread_id.` But the CREATE TABLE (line 336) has no instance_id column — the columns are (id, category, content, timestamp, thread_id). Per-instance isolation comes from make_local_proxy per-box DB, not from a column filter.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/memory/cortex.py (lines 39-42 docstring).
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: docstring-only change).
**Scope boundary:** IN — docstring truth-repair. OUT — adding instance_id column; changing schema; altering local-DB scoping.
**Test plan:** no tests because: docstring-only change. Verification = grep the new docstring and cross-read against the CREATE TABLE.
